root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to leaked global/shared state between tests. Global state must be reset/restored between tests. This PR stabilizes it by: test: fix unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts2.

evidence: evidence: test: fix unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts2
